message structure (SCALE V5):   0x05          \u2014 VersionedXcm::V5 codec prefix   0x08          \u2014 Vec<Instruction> compact(2) = 2 instructions   0x0a          \u2014 ClearOrigin instruction (clears XCM execution origin)   0x2c          \u2014 SetTopic instruction   [32 bytes]    \u2014 topic = correlationId (the bilateral async correlation ID) The correlationId links the on-chain liquidation event to the cross-chain notification, enabling off-chain indexers to correlate the bilateral flow. The destination chain does not need to act on it. Note: The XCM precompile lives at 0x00000000000000000000000000000000000A0000 and is only available on Polkadot Hub TestNet. On local Forge the contract compiles but `notifyLiquidation` reverts (no precompile present).","events":{"LiquidationNotified(address,uint256,uint256,bytes32)":{"params":{"borrower":"The address of the liquidated borrower.","collateralSeized":"The amount of collateral seized.","correlationId":"The bilateral async correlation ID embedded in the XCM topic.","debtRepaid":"The amount of debt repaid in the liquidation."}}},"kind":"dev","methods":{"executeLocalNotification(bytes32)":{"details":"Unlike notifyLiquidation which uses send() to dispatch cross-chain, this function uses execute() for provable local XCM execution. The correlationId is embedded as the XCM topic, providing on-chain proof that the XCM precompile processed the bilateral correlation payload.","params":{"correlationId":"The bilateral async correlation ID to embed as SetTopic."}},"notifyLiquidation(bytes,address,uint256,uint256,bytes32)":{"params":{"borrower":"The address of the liquidated borrower.","collateralSeized":"The amount of collateral seized.","correlationId":"The bilateral async correlation ID to embed as SetTopic.","debtRepaid":"The amount of debt repaid.","destination":"SCALE-encoded VersionedLocation (e.g. 0x050100 for relay chain)."}}},"title":"XcmLiquidationNotifier","version":1},"userdoc":{"errors":{"EmptyDestination()":[{"notice":"The destination was empty."}],"ZeroBorrower()":[{"notice":"The borrower address was zero."}]},"events":{"LiquidationNotified(address,uint256,uint256,bytes32)":{"notice":"Emitted when a liquidation notification is dispatched cross-chain."},"LocalXcmExecuted(bytes32,uint64,uint64)":{"notice":"Emitted when a local XCM execution is completed with a correlation ID."}},"kind":"user","methods":{"executeLocalNotification(bytes32)":{"notice":"Executes an XCM ClearOrigin+SetTopic message locally via the XCM precompile."},"notifyLiquidation(bytes,address,uint256,uint256,bytes32)":{"notice":"Notifies a remote chain about a liquidation event via XCM send(). Constructs a SCALE-encoded XCM V5 message with ClearOrigin + SetTopic(correlationId) and dispatches it via IXcm.send(). The correlationId is embedded as the XCM topic, enabling off-chain indexers to correlate the bilateral async event trace. XCM V5 message encoding:   0x05 = VersionedXcm::V5   0x08 = compact(2) \u2014 two instructions   0x0a = ClearOrigin (no arguments)   0x2c = SetTopic   [32 bytes] = correlationId (the topic) The SCALE-encoded destination must be a VersionedLocation V5 (prefix 0x05) e.g. 0x050100 for the relay chain parent: V5 Location { parents: 1, Here }."}},"notice":"Demonstrates XCM send() capability by broadcasting a liquidation event to a remote consensus system via the Polkadot XCM precompile. When a borrower is liquidated, this contract constructs a SCALE-encoded XCM V5 message that embeds the correlationId as a SetTopic instruction and dispatches it to the specified destination using `pallet_xcm::send`.","version":1}},"settings":{"compilationTarget":{"contracts/precompiles/XcmLiquidationNotifier.sol":"XcmLiquidationNotifier"},"evmVersion":"cancun","libraries":{},"metadata":{"bytecodeHash":"ipfs"},"optimizer":{"enabled":true,"runs":200},"remappings":[":@openzeppelin/=node_modules/@openzeppelin/",":forge-std/=lib/forge-std/src/"],"viaIR":true},"sources":{"contracts/precompiles/IXcm.sol":{"keccak256":"0xf4d50b7608a1e8fd14f5eeb8d19900acdfdf8893f87aea5c6c96e5a5776fa2ab","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://7280db1727eaab54342a57b9005e461c72e49bf1903d3fd954c0bf20e3aae60c","dweb:/ipfs/QmVbigk5yxjhCMYBFP6Z6Lrw6ipbBRiFLdWp5ZauFHSZXx"]},"contracts/precompiles/XcmLiquidationNotifier.sol":{"keccak256":"0xfe6152a46ff6863ac2f6825831bfd7dd66e4afbd4b1c815d531fa9660d8fde44","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://991651157d8cdc9e1824eca91816fd2c3c0cb6b9c4a5b5f112f4604a3682d5b0","dweb:/ipfs/QmYBdP1S8RY6UZ6rxk2PNsoYeK7p3PTPwwrB2h4PwWWTzt"]}},"version":1}

executeLocalNotification(bytes32).details: Unlike notifyLiquidation which uses send() to dispatch cross-chain, this function uses execute() for provable local XCM execution. The correlationId is embedded as the XCM topic, providing on-chain proof that the XCM precompile processed the bilateral correlation payload.

params.correlationId: The bilateral async correlation ID to embed as SetTopic.

params.borrower: The address of the liquidated borrower.
params.correlationId: The bilateral async correlation ID to embed as SetTopic.

executeLocalNotification(bytes32).notice: Executes an XCM ClearOrigin+SetTopic message locally via the XCM precompile.

notifyLiquidation(bytes,address,uint256,.notice: Notifies a remote chain about a liquidation event via XCM send(). Constructs a SCALE-encoded XCM V5 message with ClearOrigin + SetTopic(correlationId) and dispatches it via IXcm.send(). The correlationId is embedded as the XCM topic, enabling off-chain indexers to correlate the bilateral async event trace. XCM V5 message encoding:   0x05 = VersionedXcm::V5   0x08 = compact(2) — two instructions   0x0a = ClearOrigin (no arguments)   0x2c = SetTopic   [32 bytes] = correlationId (the topic) The SCALE-encoded destination must be a VersionedLocation V5 (prefix 0x05) e.g. 0x050100 for the relay chain parent: V5 Location { parents: 1, Here }.
